before_text: 唯人自闹禅和子你但见几见垩见女是
translation_after: In the Dharma there is no other dharma; delusion itself clings with attachment.
basis_note: Retroactive poem-only backfill of the T4-supported correction event. No reliable pre-correction English survived as a separately logged layer before translation-diff adoption, so the event preserves only the accepted post-correction translation.

before_text: 元衰云穗客全教现成公案高伍普鹰日用
translation_after: Where thought does not reach, discriminating consciousness is hard to fathom.
basis_note: Retroactive poem-only backfill of the T4-supported correction event. No reliable pre-correction English survived as a separately logged layer before translation-diff adoption, so the event preserves only the accepted post-correction translation.

translation_after: When the one kind is not understood, both sides lose their function.
basis_note: Supplied poem line inserted at the stable T1 boundary between T1-p021.l01 and T1-p022.l01 from the clean comparison witness sequence in T4-p002.

translation_after: If one can only be thus, what worry could there be of not being complete?
basis_note: Supplied closing poem line inserted after T1-p077.l01 from the clean comparison witness sequence in T4-p004.

after_text: 祖大師超州廣携取封在日隐野花帝鸟
translation_before: If it is not like this, it certainly need not be guarded.
basis_note: Direct T1 image review overturned a falsely stabilized poem reading at T1-p075.l01 and returned the locus to commentary noise rather than preserving a spurious poem line.

Branch-level judgment event: the standard closing line remains preserved in comparison witnesses, but the corresponding T1 locus does not visibly preserve a secure poem line and therefore stays omitted from the edited T1 reading text.

translation_before: As soon as there is right and wrong, the mind is lost in confusion.
translation_after: Even if there is right and wrong, in the midst of confusion the mind is lost.
basis_note: Direct T1 page review plus convergent OCR support restored the opening graph from 纔 to 縱 at a materially poem-level locus later carried into the published reading text and apparatus.

translation_before: Empty together, the two align and contain ten thousand gatherings.
translation_after: The one emptiness and the two together equally contain the ten thousand forms.
basis_note: Direct T1 page review plus exact Paddle support completed the remap of this poem line to its real local page position at T1-p036.l05 rather than the earlier prose-column misplacement.
